steps.action: Confirm rerun scope against the parent assignment and prior synthesis
steps.expected: Exactly the six previously failed shadcn rerun assertions are in scope
steps.observed: Rerun scope matched exactly VAL-SHADCN-001, VAL-SHADCN-003, VAL-SHADCN-004, VAL-SHADCN-005, VAL-VISUAL-030, and VAL-VISUAL-035

steps.action: Inspect shadcn configuration and installed UI primitives
steps.expected: components.json exists and Card/Dialog/Sheet primitives are present in the repo
steps.observed: components.json is present; src/components/ui/card.tsx, dialog.tsx, and sheet.tsx exist; package.json includes shadcn 4.1.0 plus @base-ui/react for the generated primitives

steps.action: Inspect dark theme tokens in globals.css
steps.expected: The dark theme maps the site to a near-black background, white foreground, and 4% white card token
steps.observed: src/app/globals.css .dark sets --background to #101010, --foreground to #ffffff, --card to rgba(255,255,255,0.04), and --card-foreground to #ffffff

assertions.title: Cards are near-transparent glass over shader

steps.action: Inspect representative graph and proof cards at rest
steps.expected: Cards use rgba(255,255,255,0.04) glass, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) borders, 8px radius, and no backdrop blur while keeping the shader visible
steps.observed: Computed styles on graph node cards and proof cards returned background rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border rgba(255,255,255,0.12), radius 8px, and backdropFilter none

steps.action: Visually compare cards against the live background
steps.expected: The blue shader remains visible through the card surfaces instead of being blocked by opaque panels
steps.observed: The default graph and proof card screenshots show the shader texture clearly visible through the glass cards

evidence.computedStyles: graph/proof card samples: bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius 8px; backdrop-filter none

assertions.title: Cursor-tracking metallic sheen on shadcn cards

steps.action: Hover representative graph and proof cards
steps.expected: Cards track the pointer with a restrained radial sheen
steps.observed: Hover updated --metal-x/--metal-y and applied a radial-gradient tied to cursor position on both graph and proof cards

steps.expected: The center highlight stays within the quiet metallic range and the hover base remains subtle
steps.observed: Computed hover styles showed rgba(255,255,255,0.16) at the hotspot, rgba(200,210,255,0.06) secondary ring, rgba(255,255,255,0.07) hover base, and only inset 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,0.02) box-shadow

steps.expected: The effect is perceptible but not flare-like
steps.observed: The sheen stayed low-contrast in screenshots and did not overpower the surrounding text or shader background

evidence.computedStyles: hover gradient: radial-gradient(... rgba(255,255,255,0.16) 0%, rgba(200,210,255,0.06) 42%, transparent 72%), hover background rgba(255,255,255,0.07), inset shadow rgba(255,255,255,0.02); CSS vars --metal-x/--metal-y update on hover

assertions.title: All text white with size/weight hierarchy

steps.action: Search production components for forbidden grey text utilities
steps.expected: No grey text utilities remain on production body, heading, label, or description surfaces
steps.observed: No text-[#a0a0a0], text-[#707070], text-gray, text-zinc, text-neutral, or text-slate matches were found in src/components; shared shadcn primitives still use text-muted-foreground, but the dark theme maps --muted-foreground to #ffffff

steps.action: Sample visible text colors in the running app
steps.expected: Visible copy computes to white or white with opacity, except for allowed contrast-inverted CTA text
steps.observed: Graph labels, headings, and descriptions computed to rgb(255,255,255) or white with alpha; the primary white CTA computed to rgb(16,16,16) on a white background, which matches the allowed contrast-inverted CTA exception

steps.expected: The shared theme keeps muted and secondary foreground text white in dark mode

evidence.computedStyles: sample runtime colors: rgb(255,255,255), white alpha via oklab(... / 0.7 or 0.8), and allowed CTA contrast inversion rgb(16,16,16) on white

assertions.title: Liquid metal card finish with glass-morphism

steps.expected: Cards show glass-morphism with semi-transparent white fill and subtle white borders
steps.observed: Proof cards rendered with the same 4% white glass base, 12% white border, and 8px corners used across the graph workspace

steps.action: Hover the proof cards and compare them to surrounding content
steps.expected: The liquid-metal response is visible but quieter than the text and atmosphere
steps.observed: On hover the cards gained the same restrained 0.16/0.06 radial sheen and stayed softer than the surrounding headings and body copy

evidence.computedStyles: proof card hover matched BetterCard contract: hotspot rgba(255,255,255,0.16), ring rgba(200,210,255,0.06), hover base rgba(255,255,255,0.07)

assertions.title: Liquid metal cards complement shader background

steps.action: Check default cards against the live shader background
steps.expected: Cards remain nearly transparent so the shader shows through them
steps.observed: The shader remains materially visible through the default graph and proof card surfaces rather than being hidden by opaque panels

steps.action: Check hovered cards for low-contrast response
steps.expected: Hover keeps a quiet metallic reaction without bright hotspots or flashes
steps.observed: The hovered cards stayed at a 0.07 base with a 0.16 hotspot and 0.06 ring, producing a calm metallic response instead of a flare

evidence.computedStyles: default cards: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); hover cards: rgba(255,255,255,0.07) plus radial gradient rgba(255,255,255,0.16)/rgba(200,210,255,0.06)

summary: Confirmed the rerun scope was exactly the six assigned assertions from the prior synthesis, and all six now pass. The BetterCard/shadcn surfaces now use the required #101010/#ffffff/rgba(255,255,255,0.04) token setup, 8px glass cards over the visible shader, restrained 0.16/0.06 hover sheen, and white or opacity-white text outside the allowed contrast-inverted CTA exception.
